version_description: Acoustic Guitar gentle strum open chords or simple pluck as per chord guide at top of tab.Try Capo at 1 Starting A to make chords easier to find.

versions.version_description: Chords well suited for piano/keys, bass notes included. Based on YouTube Link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lTQtBtafCMg.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Dont Take Your Guns To Town

content:
Phil Collins - One More Night

                                 You Tube Link : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zKVq-P3z5Vg
[ch]Bb[/ch] -    688766
[ch]Eb[/ch] -    x68886
[ch]Eb/Bb[/ch] - 668886
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]   - 131111
Cm7   - Barre Chord[/tab]
[ch]Eb/Db[/ch] - 98888x


   [Intro]
[ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Eb[/ch]


   [Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Eb[/ch]
One more night,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Eb[/ch]
One more night[/tab]

   [Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]          [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]        [ch]Fm[/ch]     [ch]Eb[/ch]
I've been trying ooh so long to let you know[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]      [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]           [ch]Fm7[/ch]
Let you know how I feel[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]         [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]        [ch]Fm7[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]
And if I stumble if I fall, just help me back[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]       [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]    [ch]Fm7[/ch]
So I can make you see[/tab]


   [Chorus]
[tab]               [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]             [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
Please give me one more night, give me one more night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]Fm7[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]
One more night cos I can't wait forever[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]             [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
Give me just one more night, oh just one more night[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]                [ch]Fm7[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh one more night cos I can't wait forever[/tab]

   [Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]           [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]        [ch]Fm[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]
I've been sitting here so long Wasting time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]       [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]           [ch]Fm7[/ch]
just staring at the phone[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]            [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]          [ch]Fm7[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]
And I was wondering should I call you Then I thought[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]        [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]   [ch]Fm7[/ch]
maybe you're not alone[/tab]


   [Chorus]
[tab]               [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
Please give me one more night, give me just one more night[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]Fm7[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh one more night, cos I can't wait forever[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Fm7[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
Please give me one more night, ooh just one more night[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]                [ch]Fm7[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh one more night, cos I can't wait forever[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
Give me one more night, give me just one more night[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]Fm7[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]
Ooh one more night, cos I can't wait forever[/tab]


   [Bridge]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]    [ch]Eb/Db[/ch]        [ch]Cm7[/ch]
Like a river to the sea[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Eb/Db[/ch]          [ch]Cm7[/ch]
I will always be with you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb/Db[/ch]        [ch]Cm7[/ch]
And if you sail away[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Eb/Db[/ch]
I will follow you[/tab]


   [Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
Give me one more night, give me just one more night[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]Fm7[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh one more night, cos I can't wait forever[/tab]


   [Verse 3]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]              [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]           [ch]Fm[/ch]               [ch]Eb[/ch]
I know there'll never be a time you'll ever feel the same[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]         [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]          [ch]Fm7[/ch]
And I know it's only words[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]         [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]                [ch]Fm7[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
But if you change your mind you know that I'll be here[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Ab[/ch]       [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]    [ch]Fm7[/ch]
And maybe we both can learn[/tab]


   [Chorus repeat to fade]
[tab]             [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
Give me just one more night, give me just one more night[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]Fm7[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]
Ooh one more night, cos I can't wait forever[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Fm7[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
Give me just one more night, give me just one more night[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]Fm7[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]
Ooh one more night, cos I can't wait forever[/tab]


Mark W
